title: Master_Recycling_Guide_Part_7_Textiles_Bulky_Items
text:
### Can I recycle a bicycle?

Many scrap metal recyclers accept bicycles.

### Can I recycle a refrigerator?

Yes through appliance recycling programs.

### Can I recycle tires?

Use tire retailers or approved collection sites.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Common Mistakes

Avoid placing these in curbside recycling:

-   Clothing
-   Shoes
-   Carpets
-   Furniture
-   Mattresses
-   Tires
-   Large appliances
-   Garden furniture

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Search Synonyms

Users may search for:

-   Clothes
-   Clothing
-   Textiles
-   Fabric
-   Shoes
-   Sneakers
-   Boots
-   Couch
-   Sofa
-   Mattress
-   Bed
-   Refrigerator
-   Fridge
-   Washer
-   Dryer
-   Tire
-   Bicycle
-   Scrap metal
-   Bulky item

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Best Practices

-   Donate usable items.
-   Repair before replacing.
-   Use municipal bulky-item collection.
-   Use specialty recycling programs for large items.
-   Follow local disposal requirements.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# References

-   U.S. EPA Sustainable Materials Management: https://www.epa.gov/smm
-   Earth911 Recycling Search: https://search.earth911.com/
-   Bye Bye Mattress: https://byebyemattress.com/
